rationale: Stand 2022-09-30: watchlist is at cap=16 and already covers every wave in the profile with defensible pre-date theses. AI/mega-cap (AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, NVDA, SPY, SMH) — NVDA's 2022-08-24 Q2 FY23 gaming miss is a known macro drag, but the 2022-09-07 BIS chip export controls reinforce the domestic-semi (SMH) and AI-leader thesis. Nuclear (URA, CCJ, NLR) — Aug 2022 IRA Section 45U nuclear PTC + Sep 2022 Nord Stream pipeline closure + Japan reactor restart announcements all pre-date; the three names cover miner ETF, single-name producer, and broader utility-inclusive ETF without redundant overlap. Rockets (RKLB) — 2022-09-15 'Owl Spreads Its Wings' SAR launch shows operational cadence. Robotics (BOTZ, ISRG) — Q2 2022 release already showed da Vinci procedures recovering. Quantum (IONQ) — single-conviction pick, no listed peer pre-date worth pairing. Geopolitical-energy (LNG, XLE) — Nord Stream sabotage + EU LNG imports +60% YoY directly underpin LNG; XLE covers integrated oil into pre-Oct OPEC+ cut speculation. Defense (ITA) — 2022-09-23 Trump UN/Zelensky meeting + ongoing Russia/Ukraine flow bullish; ETF gives diversified prime exposure. Candidates evaluated: PLTR (2022-09-18 UK MoD £750M AI contract) overlaps with existing AI-mega-cap exposure; LMT/NOC overlap with ITA; SMR (NuScale) too early-stage with 2022 cost-estimate concerns (IEEFA). No add justifies displacing any current name. Profile excludes solar/wind/engineered_biology — none in or proposed for watchlist. Holding stable; optimizer can work the current universe.
